Section Title: ... > **What Are Global Mutual Funds and How Do They Work?**
Content:
Global mutual funds are schemes that invest in companies listed in international markets.
These funds may invest in:
US technology companies
European multinational firms
emerging market businesses
global sector leaders
By investing internationally, these funds allow Indian investors to participate in global economic growth and benefit from opportunities outside the domestic market.
Because the underlying assets are denominated in foreign currencies, returns are influenced by both **market performance and exchange rate movements** .

results.title: NFO Alert : Zerodha Fund House launches Nifty MidSmallcap400 50:50 Index Fund - The Economic Times
excerpts:
Section Title: NFO Alert : Zerodha Fund House launches Nifty MidSmallcap400 50:50 Index Fund
Content:
SECTIONS
NFO Alert : Zerodha Fund House launches Nifty MidSmallcap400 50:50 Index Fund
By
Surbhi Khanna
, ET Online Last Updated: Mar 23, 2026, 04:50:00 PM IST
Rate Story
[](https://www.google.com/preferences/source?q=economictimes)
[Follow us](https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029Vb6dOI1EKyZPPqpH7I0y)
Share
Font Size
Abc Small
Abc Medium
Abc Large
Save
Print
Comment
Synopsis
Zerodha Fund House has launched the Zerodha Nifty MidSmallcap400 50:50 Index Fund, an open-ended equity index fund. This new offering allows investors to equally allocate to mid-cap and small-cap segments of the Indian market, with subscriptions closing on April 6. The fund aims to provide broad exposure to 400 companies, offering potential for long-term capital growth with a high-risk appetite.
Section Title: NFO Alert : Zerodha Fund House launches Nifty MidSmallcap400 50:50 Index Fund
Content:
Agencies Midcap and smallcap segments may contribute to higher growth potential, albeit with relatively higher volatility, together offering a balanced risk-return profile.
Zerodha Fund House today announced the launch of the Zerodha Nifty MidSmallcap400 50:50 Index Fund , an open-ended equity index fund tracking the Nifty MidSmallcap400 50:50 Index TRI . The fund offers investors a simple way to allocate equally to both the midcap and smallcap segments of the Indian market.
The new fund offer or NFO of the scheme is open for subscription and will close on April 6.
 ...

results.title: Zerodha Nifty 50 Index Fund Direct Growth - NAV, Mutual Fund Performance & Portfolio
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > ### About Zerodha Nifty 50 Index Fund Direct Growth
Content:
Zerodha Nifty 50 Index Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by Zerodha Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 20 Dec 2021. Kedarnath Mirajkar is the Current Fund Manager of Zerodha Nifty 50 Index Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹14,719 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 02 Apr 2026 is ₹9.02.
The Zerodha Nifty 50 Index Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. ;
